user_query:
Run an offline before/after regression evaluation on the provided suite and produce both a text report and a JSON result.

Requirements
- Read input/regression_suite.json
- Validate evidence quality (matching IDs, presence of critical cases) and note any limitations
- For each case, score correctness, relevance, actionability, and tool reliability; determine pass/soft_fail/fail and note degradations from before to after
- Aggregate metrics (overall_pass_rate, critical_pass_rate, soft_fail_rate, tool_reliability_rate, averages) and compute deltas vs. before
- Apply medium-risk release gates; return exactly one verdict (go, conditional_go, no_go, or rollback). If any critical case fails or shows tool failure or missing fallback, treat it as a critical regression and prefer "rollback"
- Cluster failures using standard names when applicable (instruction_following_drift, factuality_drop, retrieval_miss, tool_call_failure, format_noncompliance, missing_fallback, hallucinated_capability) and propose recommended fixes
- Output two files:
  1) output/report.txt — follow the textual template sections (Executive Summary, Suite Summary, Scorecard, Deltas, Top Regressions, Failure Clusters, Verdict, Recommended Fixes, Confidence, Limitations)
  2) output/result.json — follow the structured schema with suite_summary, scorecard, deltas, verdict, top_regressions, failure_clusters, recommended_fixes, confidence, and limitations
- Preserve the input risk_level in outputs and ensure suite_summary totals match the input cases
- Do not make any network calls
